data.title: Innovax Holdings Approves Share Consolidation Amid Strong Support
data.description:
Innovax Holdings Limited (HK:2680) has released an update.

Innovax Holdings Limited has successfully passed a resolution for a share consolidation, converting every ten shares into one, with overwhelming shareholder support at a recent extraordinary general meeting. This consolidation aims to streamline the company’s share structure, and it will take effect on October 25, 2024. Investors are advised to review the details regarding trading arrangements and exchange of share certificates.

For further insights into HK:2680 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Thesis Gold’s Promising Drilling Results Boost Prospects
data.description:
Benchmark Metals Inc (TSE:TAU) has released an update.

Thesis Gold Inc. has confirmed high-grade gold and silver mineralization at its Lawyers-Ranch Project, enhancing open-pit and underground mining potential. The 2024 drill program results suggest significant opportunities for resource growth and improved project economics, with an upcoming Prefeasibility Study expected to further refine these prospects.

For further insights into TSE:TAU stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Viomi Technology Extends Share Buyback Plan to 2025
data.description:
Viomi Technology Co (VIOT) has released an update.

Viomi Technology Co., Ltd, a leader in home water solutions, has extended its share repurchase plan for an additional year, allowing for the repurchase of up to $10 million of its American Depositary Shares through October 2025. This move underscores the company’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value by utilizing its existing cash reserves. So far, Viomi has repurchased approximately $901,258 worth of shares from the open market.

For further insights into VIOT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EdiliziAcrobatica’s Client Base and Contracts Surge
data.description:
EdiliziAcrobatica SpA (IT:EDAC) has released an update.

EdiliziAcrobatica S.p.A. saw an impressive 84.2% rise in clients and a 22% increase in contracts in the first nine months of the year, signaling its growing dominance in the building renovation sector. The company’s innovative rope construction work and sustainable services continue to attract families and corporations, highlighting its significant growth potential in the market.

For further insights into IT:EDAC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Alliance Healthcare Prepares for Investor Engagement at AGM
data.description:
Alliance Healthcare Group Ltd. (SG:MIJ) has released an update.

Alliance Healthcare Group Ltd. is preparing for its upcoming Annual General Meeting on October 29, 2024, where it will address key questions from shareholders and the Securities Investors Association Singapore. The company appreciates the engagement from investors and has provided detailed responses to inquiries, reflecting its commitment to transparency and effective communication.

data.title: CSPC Innovation Reports Declining Financial Performance
data.description:
CSPC Pharmaceutical Group (HK:1093) has released an update.

CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical Co., a subsidiary of CSPC Pharmaceutical Group, reported a significant decline in its financial performance for the nine months ending September 2024. Revenue fell by 23.66% while net profit attributable to shareholders plummeted by 63.50% compared to the previous year. Investors are advised to exercise caution when dealing with the company’s securities amidst these challenging financial results.

For further insights into HK:1093 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Strategic Metals’ Terra CO2 Secures Funding for Utah Plant
data.description:
Strategic Metals (TSE:SMD) has released an update.

Strategic Metals has announced that its portfolio holding, Terra CO2 Technology, secured $52.6 million from the U.S. Department of Energy to build a new facility in Utah. This facility will produce a low-emission, cost-effective alternative to traditional cement, significantly reducing carbon emissions.

For further insights into TSE:SMD stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Melrose Director Increases Stake with Share Purchase
data.description:
Melrose (GB:MRO) has released an update.

Ian Barkshire, a Non-executive Director at Melrose Industries PLC, has acquired 17,000 ordinary shares of the company at a price of 442 pence per share, totaling GBP 75,140. This purchase reflects a small stake in the company, highlighting a potential vote of confidence in Melrose’s future performance by its management.

For further insights into GB:MRO stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Dasin Retail Trust Receives New Loan Payment Notices
data.description:
Dasin Retail Trust (SG:CEDU) has released an update.

Dasin Retail Trust is facing additional notices from the Bank of China Limited, Zhongshan Branch, concerning outstanding payments related to its onshore syndicated term loan facility. This development adds to the ongoing financial restructuring efforts of the Trust, which has been dealing with multiple offshore and onshore loan facilities. Investors and market participants are closely watching how Dasin Retail Trust navigates these financial challenges.

For further insights into SG:CEDU stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
